title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
summary: Olmo-eval是一个专为模型开发循环设计的评估工作台，旨在简化语言模型的评估流程，支持快速迭代和实验追踪。
highlights: Olmo-eval is designed for the model development loop.
It streamlines evaluation of language models.
Supports rapid iteration and experiment tracking.
